final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing logo for a tech-lifestyle content creator brand focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: clean flat vector logo, modern geometric minimalism, universal appeal across cultures, Apple-inspired restraint
Subject: abstract pictorial mark suggesting energy flow or connectivity, balanced with simple wordmark, scalable silhouette
Composition: centered mark with generous padding, works in square crop for all social platforms
Color palette: neutral base (deep navy or charcoal) with one accent color (electric blue or soft teal), avoids red/green cultural triggers
Constraints: must read clearly at 32x32 pixels; monochrome version must work without color; no culturally sensitive symbols or religious imagery
Avoid: specific vehicle silhouettes that could be brand-specific; lightning bolts; gradients; flags; hand gestures; religious symbols; text in any language; complex illustrations; Behance generic flat style
